title: Cariño mío
writer: Manuel Tamayo, Antonio Abad Ojuel, Arturo Rígel
actors: Vicente Parra, Marianne Hold, Manolo Morán
plot: Miguel and Verónica meet on a plane and lie to each other about their true selves: she tells him she's a secretary but she's the billionaire niece of a duchess; and he, a Teutonic king, tells her he's a trumpet player. Eventually ...
